title: Malimala
description: Vanilla Feel Modpack for the server: mc.malimala.net
body:
🎮 **Malimala SMP Modpack** A community modpack made for the **Malimala SMP-Server!** 🧱 **Vanilla experience but enhanced**: This pack introduces minor, high-quality-of-life enhancements without altering the core gameplay mechanics. It’s ideal for players who cherish the vanilla Minecraft experience but desire a smoother and more cohesive multiplayer experience. ✅ **Features**: - Build for a better vanilla gameplay and aesthetics - Built for community play: simple, stable, and cooperative - Performance-friendly - Regular updates 📦 Easy to install via Modrinth. 💬 Community info & server IP available in our Discord! ----- Mod List: h.com/mod/r0v8vy1s">Alternate Current by Space Walker
